title: ormosia pinnata
intro: Ormosia pinnata, also known as the Kevazingo tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The bark and seeds of the Ormosia pinnata plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating malaria, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and seeds of the Ormosia pinnata plant are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
